name: neg_zero
description: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.3 — negative zero serializes to '0'

name: pos_zero
description: Sanity: positive zero serializes to '0'

name: int_two_to_53
description: 2^53 — last integer exactly representable as IEEE 754 double

name: int_two_to_53_plus_1
description: 2^53 + 1 — first integer NOT exactly representable as double. Both canonicalizers parse input and coerce to nearest representable value (2^53) before serialization. Deterministic lost-precision behavior.

name: large_sci_1e100
description: Large scientific notation: 1e+100

name: small_sci_1_5e_neg10
description: Small scientific notation: 1.5e-10

name: float_add_0_1_plus_0_2
description: Classic float-add result: 0.1 + 0.2 = 0.30000000000000004 across IEEE 754 runtimes

name: dup_key_last_wins
description: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 + JSON parse semantics: duplicate keys collapse to last value. Input is pre-parsed object.
input_note: Source was JSON string '{"a":1,"a":2}'; both JSON.parse (JS) and json.loads (Python) keep the last occurrence, yielding {a:2}.

name: nfc_key_cafe_composed
description: Unicode NFC: key 'café' with composed é (U+00E9, UTF-8: c3 a9). RFC 8785 §3.2.3 forbids normalization.

name: nfd_key_cafe_decomposed
description: Unicode NFD: key 'café' as 'e' + combining acute (U+0301, UTF-8 bytes cc 81). Must be byte-distinct from NFC.

name: empty_key_first
description: Empty-string key sorts before 'a' lexicographically.

name: sort_basic_ba
description: Basic key sort: {b,a} serializes as {a,b}.

name: sort_unicode_utf16
description: RFC 8785 §3.2.3: sort is UTF-16 code-unit lexicographic. 'A' (0x41) < 'a' (0x61) < 'z' (0x7A).

name: mixed_obj_array
description: Nested object + array mix with key sort: {a:[], z:[1,{a:2}]}

name: nested_obj_10
description: 10-level deep object: {x:{x:{...{x:1}...}}}

name: nested_arr_10
description: 10-level deep array wrapping [1]

name: str_escape_newline_tab_quote_backslash_nul
description: String escapes: \n, \t, \", \\, and NUL (\u0000). RFC 8785 §3.2.2.5 mandates \uXXXX for control chars.

name: emoji_lock
description: Emoji 🔒 (U+1F512) — surrogate pair in UTF-16, 4 bytes UTF-8 (f0 9f 94 92). Byte-for-byte preserved.

name: cjk_japanese
description: CJK '日本語' — 3 chars, 9 UTF-8 bytes. Byte-for-byte preserved.

name: null_in_mixed_array
description: Mixed array: [{}, [], null, 0, ''] — canonicalizer preserves order and null.

name: reject_nan
description: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.4: NaN is not a valid JSON number. Canonicalizer MUST reject.

name: reject_pos_infinity
description: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.4: +Infinity is not a valid JSON number. Canonicalizer MUST reject.

name: reject_neg_infinity
description: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.4: -Infinity is not a valid JSON number. Canonicalizer MUST reject.
